footer.tagline: 3-in-1 solution for building frame and envelope.
footer.sub: Pre-engineered steel · High-performance insulation · Comprehensive waterproofing
footer.slogan: Honest. Clear. With you all the way.

home.hero_headline: A good construction doesn't start with many choices.
home.guided_lead: Perhaps you're thinking about a project from different angles.
home.guided_q: What do you want to be clearer about right now?
home.guided_c2: An idea that needs to stay true
home.guided_c3: A project that needs clear control
home.bridge: A lasting structure is not decided at its most visible part, but at the intersections that are easily overlooked.
home.pain_headline: Projects aren't tired because they're complex. They're tired because they're split among too many parties.
home.pain_sub: The real pain is not in the drawings. It's in the disconnection.
home.pain_1_desc: Construction stalls when the steel frame waits for the envelope, and the envelope waits for waterproofing.
home.pain_2_desc: Fixing symptoms without resolving the root cause — because each party works in a different system.
home.pain_3_desc: Design intent is lost on site because no single party holds the complete picture.
home.pain_4_desc: When deadlines arrive, each party blames another. No one owns the full outcome.
home.solution_headline: 3-in-1, so your project stays intact at its most critical intersections.
home.pillar_1_desc: Faster construction, lower tolerance. Every structural detail is controlled from fabrication to site.
home.pillar_2_desc: Real thermal reduction — not just a surface layer. Designed in from the structural drawings.
home.pillar_3_desc: Addressed at the interface between structure and envelope — where leaks begin but few notice.
home.audience_1_copy: A place to live — stable, no unexpected costs.
home.audience_2_copy: Keep your design intent intact from drawing to site.
home.audience_3_copy: Clear schedule, cost control, and transparent handover.
home.projects_headline: Structures built through a clearer way of working.
home.final_sub: Send your floor plan or concept to receive a tailored solution proposal.

solution.headline: 3-in-1, so your project stays intact at its most critical intersections.
solution.sub: FrameX integrates pre-engineered steel, high-performance insulation and comprehensive waterproofing under one executing entity.
solution.why_desc: When structure, insulation, and waterproofing are handled by 3 separate parties, every intersection becomes a risk. Multiple contacts — multiple interpretations — multiple risks accumulating at the end.

investor.headline: A good project is not just delivered on time. It must run smoothly after that.
investor.sub: FrameX provides one point of contact for the entire frame and envelope.

contractor.headline: A cleaner site starts with clearer boundaries.
contractor.sub: FrameX is your frame and envelope partner — reducing conflicts and clarifying scope.

architect.headline: A good idea shouldn't be lost at the intersections.
architect.sub: FrameX integrates proactively from the start — so every detail connects coherently.

projects.headline: Structures built through a clearer way of working.
projects.sub: Each project is a different problem. The approach is consistent.

blog.headline: Worth reading before a project gets complicated.

about.headline: FrameX
about.sub: 3-in-1 solution for building frame and envelope.
about.mission: We believe a good project begins with clarity — in commitment, in cost, and in every handover point. FrameX was built to be the single partner accountable for the entire frame and envelope.
